text:

From-To: open->feedback

This issue has just been discussed on the freebsd-hackers mailing list 
and some very interesting points came up. Have a look at: 
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/mid.cgi?id=37A6CA97.1F0DA32F@cdsec.com 
and use the "Next in thread" links to follow the discussion. 

Let me know whether or not the thread helped you.
